```{r suppfig2_prior_drugs, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
    mutate(
        proportion = n_patients / total_patients,
        percentage = round(proportion * 100, 1)
    ) %>%
    arrange(Cohort, desc(percentage))

supp_fig2 <- prior_drugs_prop %>% 
  ggplot(
        aes(
            x = drugclass,
            y = percentage,
            fill = Cohort
        )
    ) +
    geom_bar(color = "black", stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
    labs(
        x = "",
        y = "Percentage of Patients with Prior Exposure",
        fill = "Cohort"
    ) +
    panel_theme_basic +
    scale_fill_nejm() +
    theme(
        legend.position = c(0.8, 0.7),
        legend.direction = "vertical",
        plot.margin = margin(1, 0, 0, 1, "cm"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 16),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1), limits = c(0, 100), expand = c(0, 0), breaks = seq(0, 100, 10))
supp_fig2
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure2_PriorDrugs.png"), supp_fig2, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

# Supp Figure 3 - Carbo before PARP and PARP
```{r supp_fig3, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
carbo_then_parp <- drug_info %>%
    filter(original_data == TRUE) %>%
    filter(!(DEID %in% c(Not_Paired_DEID, Samples_Less_Than_30_Days_Apart))) %>%
    # We will also remove "oral" drugs that were only taken for a day since these are likely issues with data entry
    filter(!(grepl("oral", APR_ROUTE) & APR_DURATION == 1)) %>%
    # Now we need to find the oldest occurrence of a specific drug
    group_by(DEID, druggeneric, drugclass_c, Cohort) %>%
    summarise(earliest_drug_date = min(APR_START_DTE, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    left_join(
        deid_earliest_regimen_date %>%
            select(DEID, Cohort, earliest_regimen_date),
        by = c("DEID", "Cohort")
    ) %>%
    # These are all the drugs that were received prior to the earliest sample collection date, so we can be assured that they were received before the sample was collected
    filter(
        earliest_drug_date < (earliest_regimen_date)
    ) %>%
    mutate(
        drugclass = case_when(
            drugclass_c == "targeted_therapy_parp" ~ "PARP Inhibitor",
            drugclass_c == "cytotoxic_therapy" ~ "Cytotoxic Therapy",
            drugclass_c == "cytotoxic_therapy_platinum" ~ "Platinum Therapy",
            drugclass_c == "radionuclide" ~ "Radionuclide",
            drugclass_c == "radiation_therapy" ~ "Radiation Therapy",
            drugclass_c == "immune_therapy" ~ "Immune Therapy",
            TRUE ~ "Other Targeted Therapy"
        )
    ) %>%
    # This oral entry overlaps between Olaparib and Niraparib, so we will remove it since it is likely a data entry error
    filter(!(drugclass == "PARP Inhibitor" & Cohort == "PARPi" & DEID == "1567490")) %>%
    filter(Cohort == "PARPi", drugclass == "Platinum Therapy") %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    distinct(DEID) %>%
    pull(DEID)

carbo_then_carbo <- drug_info %>%
    filter(original_data == TRUE) %>%
    filter(!(DEID %in% c(Not_Paired_DEID, Samples_Less_Than_30_Days_Apart))) %>%
    # We will also remove "oral" drugs that were only taken for a day since these are likely issues with data entry
    filter(!(grepl("oral", APR_ROUTE) & APR_DURATION == 1)) %>%
    # Now we need to find the oldest occurrence of a specific drug
    group_by(DEID, druggeneric, drugclass_c, Cohort) %>%
    summarise(earliest_drug_date = min(APR_START_DTE, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    left_join(
        deid_earliest_regimen_date %>%
            select(DEID, Cohort, earliest_regimen_date),
        by = c("DEID", "Cohort")
    ) %>%
    # These are all the drugs that were received prior to the earliest sample collection date, so we can be assured that they were received before the sample was collected
    filter(
        earliest_drug_date < (earliest_regimen_date)
    ) %>%
    mutate(
        drugclass = case_when(
            drugclass_c == "targeted_therapy_parp" ~ "PARP Inhibitor",
            drugclass_c == "cytotoxic_therapy" ~ "Cytotoxic Therapy",
            drugclass_c == "cytotoxic_therapy_platinum" ~ "Platinum Therapy",
            drugclass_c == "radionuclide" ~ "Radionuclide",
            drugclass_c == "radiation_therapy" ~ "Radiation Therapy",
            drugclass_c == "immune_therapy" ~ "Immune Therapy",
            TRUE ~ "Other Targeted Therapy"
        )
    ) %>%
    # This oral entry overlaps between Olaparib and Niraparib, so we will remove it since it is likely a data entry error
    filter(!(drugclass == "PARP Inhibitor" & Cohort == "PARPi" & DEID == "1567490")) %>%
    filter(Cohort == "Carboplatin", drugclass == "Platinum Therapy") %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    distinct(DEID) %>%
    pull(DEID)

carbo_then_parp_tp <- rbind(
    timepoints %>%
        filter(DeID %in% carbo_then_parp),
    timepoints %>%
        filter(DeID %in% c("1536848", "1734282", "1755649", "1592606", "1620504")) %>%
        filter(Cohort == "PARPi")
) %>%
    mutate(
        multiple_drug_classification = "Received Carboplatin"
    ) %>%
    filter(Gene_Class == "DDR")

df_to_plot <- timepoints %>%
    filter(!(DeID %in% carbo_then_parp_tp$DeID)) %>%
    filter(Cohort == "PARPi") %>%
    mutate(
        multiple_drug_classification = "No Prior Carboplatin"
    ) %>%
    rbind(carbo_then_parp_tp) %>%
    rbind(
        timepoints %>%
            filter(!(DeID %in% carbo_then_parp_tp$DeID)) %>%
            filter(Cohort == "Carboplatin") %>%
            mutate(
                multiple_drug_classification = "Carboplatin"
            )
    ) %>%
    filter(growth_rate != Inf & growth_rate != -Inf) %>%
    filter(Gene_Class == "DDR") %>%
    mutate(
        multiple_drug_classification = factor(multiple_drug_classification, levels = c("Carboplatin", "No Prior Carboplatin", "Received Carboplatin"))
    )

model_ddr_carbo_then_parp <- rbind(
    glm(
        formula = growth_rate ~ multiple_drug_classification + AGE + SEX + RACE,
        data = df_to_plot
    ) %>% sjPlot::get_model_data(type = "est") %>% filter(grepl("multiple_drug_classification", term)),
    glm(
        formula = growth_rate ~ multiple_drug_classification + AGE + SEX + RACE,
        data = df_to_plot %>% filter(multiple_drug_classification != "Carboplatin")
    ) %>% sjPlot::get_model_data(type = "est") %>% filter(grepl("multiple_drug_classification", term))
)

supp_fig3 <- df_to_plot %>%
    ggplot(
        aes(
            x = multiple_drug_classification,
            y = growth_rate,
            fill = Cohort
        )
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width=0.2), alpha = 0.2, color = "black") +
    labs(
        x = "",
        y = "Growth Rate of DDR Mutations",
        fill = "Cohort"
    ) +
    panel_theme_basic +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B5FF", "#E18727FF", "#EAAB67FF")) +
    theme(
        legend.position = "top",
        plot.margin = margin(2, 0, 0, 1, "cm"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans = scales::pseudo_log_trans(0.001), breaks = c(-0.05, -0.01, -0.005, 0, 0.005, 0.01, 0.05), limits = c(NA,0.3)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot %>% filter(Gene_Class == "DDR"), 4, 1, 2, model_ddr_carbo_then_parp$p.value[1], model_ddr_carbo_then_parp$p.stars[1], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot %>% filter(Gene_Class == "DDR"), 5, 1, 3, model_ddr_carbo_then_parp$p.value[2], model_ddr_carbo_then_parp$p.stars[2], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot %>% filter(Gene_Class == "DDR"), 4.2, 2, 3, model_ddr_carbo_then_parp$p.value[3], model_ddr_carbo_then_parp$p.stars[3], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6))
    #do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot %>% filter(Gene_Class == "DDR"), 4, 1, 1.8, model_ddr_carbo_then_parp$p.value[1], model_ddr_carbo_then_parp$p.stars[1], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    #do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot %>% filter(Gene_Class == "DDR"), 5, 1, 2.2, model_ddr_carbo_then_parp$p.value[2], model_ddr_carbo_then_parp$p.stars[2], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    #do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot %>% filter(Gene_Class == "DDR"), 4.2, 1.8, 2.2, model_ddr_carbo_then_parp$p.value[3], model_ddr_carbo_then_parp$p.stars[3], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6))
supp_fig3
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure3_CarboBeforePARP_GrowthRates.png"), supp_fig3, width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

# Supp Figure 4 - mCA Growth x CH Growth Rate
```{r supp_fig4, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# There are 69 patients with mCA detected at either timepoint, and they also have a CH mutation detected at either timepoint
has_mca_and_ch <- intersect(
    mocha_timepoints$PatientID,
    timepoints$DeID
)

df_to_plot <- timepoints %>%
    filter(growth_rate != Inf & growth_rate != -Inf) %>%
    filter(!(DeID %in% c(parp_then_carbo, carbo_then_parp))) %>%
    filter(DeID %in% has_mca_and_ch) %>%
    filter(DeID != "PA00051248") %>%  # Outlier with no mCA or CH
    filter(Gene_Class == "DDR" | Gene_Class == "DTA") %>%
    select(DeID, Cohort, change_in_VAF, growth_rate) %>%
    dplyr::rename(PatientID = DeID) %>%
    group_by(PatientID, Cohort) %>%
    summarise(
        average_change_in_VAF = mean(change_in_VAF, na.rm = TRUE),
        average_CH_growth_rate = mean(growth_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    left_join(
        mocha_timepoints %>%
            filter(growth_rate != Inf & growth_rate != -Inf) %>%
            filter(!(PatientID %in% c(parp_then_carbo, carbo_then_parp))) %>%
            filter(PatientID %in% has_mca_and_ch) %>%
            filter(event == "mCA") %>%
            select(PatientID, Cohort, change_in_cf, growth_rate) %>%
            group_by(PatientID, Cohort) %>%
            summarise(
                average_change_in_cf = mean(change_in_cf, na.rm = TRUE),
                average_mCA_growth_rate = mean(growth_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
            ),
        by = c("PatientID", "Cohort")
    )

# By Growth Rate
supp_fig4 <- df_to_plot %>%
    ggplot(
        aes(
            x = average_CH_growth_rate,
            y = average_mCA_growth_rate,
            color = Cohort
        )
    ) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    labs(
        x = "Average CH Growth Rate",
        y = "Average mCA Growth Rate",
        color = "Cohort"
    ) +
    panel_theme_basic +
    scale_color_nejm() +
    theme(
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.direction = "vertical",
        plot.margin = margin(1, 0, 1, 1, "cm")
    ) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)
supp_fig4
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure4_CHvsCNA_GrowthRate.png"), supp_fig4, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

# Supp Figure 5B - CD45 Isoforms
```{r supp_fig5b, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
supp_fig5b <- make_mouse_cell_plot(
    mouse_data[["SuppFigure 5B"]] %>%
        mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Vehicle", "Cisplatin", "Talazoparib"))),
    cell_col = "WT:WT Total Leukocytes",
    title = "WT:WT Total Leukocytes", y_lab = "CD45.2 Cells\n(Normalized to 0-Week)"
)
supp_fig5b
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure5B_CD45_Isoforms.png"), supp_fig5b, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

# Supp Figure 6 - Leukocytes Raw Chimerism
```{r supp_fig_leukocytes_raw_chimerism, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
supp_fig6 <- mouse_data[["SuppFigure 6"]] %>%
    mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Vehicle", "Cisplatin", "Talazoparib", "Olaparib"))) %>%
    group_by(Cohort, Week) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_value = mean(Leukocytes, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_value = sd(Leukocytes, na.rm = TRUE),
      sem_value = sd(Leukocytes, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    ggplot(
      aes(
        x = factor(Week),
        y = mean_value,
        fill = Cohort,
        color = Cohort,
        shape = Cohort,
        group = Cohort
      )
    ) +
    geom_point(size = 4) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(
      aes(
        ymin = mean_value - sem_value,
        ymax = mean_value + sem_value
      ),
      width = 0.5
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Weeks Post-Treatment",
      y = "%CD45.2 Cells",
      title = "Leukocytes",
      fill = "Cohort",
      color = "Cohort"
    ) +
    panel_theme_basic +
    scale_fill_nejm() +
    scale_color_nejm() +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(15, 16, 17, 18)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 80), labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 1L)) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.direction = "vertical",
      plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1, "cm"),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(limits = as.character(0:20), expand = c(0, 0.5), breaks = c(0, 6, 10, 14, 18))
supp_fig6 <- add_significance_annotation(supp_fig6, "P=0.0018", 19.5, 67, 40, size_text = 4)
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure6_Leukocytes_Raw_Chimerism.png"), supp_fig6, width = 12, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```


# Supp Figure 7 - CH Growth Rate by Germline HRD Status
```{r suppfig7_growth_rate_germline_HRD, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
df_to_plot <- timepoints %>%
    filter(growth_rate != Inf & growth_rate != -Inf) %>%
    filter(Gene_Class == "DDR" | Gene_Class == "DTA") %>%
    mutate(
        BRCA = case_when(
            HRD_Single %in% c("BRCA1", "BRCA2") ~ "BRCA1/2",
            HRD_Single %in% c("ATM", "CHEK2", "RAD51D", "BRIP1") ~ "Other HRD Germline",  # Keep these as-is
            TRUE ~ as.character(HRD_Single)  # Keep all other values as-is
        ),
        BRCA = ifelse(is.na(BRCA), "Other HRD Germline", BRCA)  # Replace NA with "BRIP1" because only 1 patient is missing
    ) %>%
    filter(BRCA %in% c("No Germline", "BRCA1/2", "Other HRD Germline"))

model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm <- purrr::cross_df(list(
    class = c("DDR"),
    germline = c("No Germline", "BRCA1/2", "Other HRD Germline")
)) %>%
    pmap_dfr(function(class, germline) {
        print(paste("Processing", class, germline))
        main <- if (germline != "No Germline") {
            glm(
                formula = growth_rate ~ Cohort + AGE + SEX + RACE,
                data = df_to_plot %>%
                    filter(Gene_Class == class, BRCA == germline) %>%
                    filter(Cohort != "Healthy") %>%
                    mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Carboplatin", "PARPi")))
            ) %>%
                sjPlot::get_model_data(type = "est") %>%
                filter(grepl("Cohort", term)) %>%
                mutate(
                    Class = class, 
                    BRCA = germline,
                    term = "CarboplatinVSPARPi"
                )
        } else {
            bind_rows(
                glm(
                    formula = growth_rate ~ Cohort + AGE + SEX + RACE,
                    data = df_to_plot %>%
                        filter(Gene_Class == class, BRCA == germline)
                ) %>%
                    sjPlot::get_model_data(type = "est") %>%
                    filter(grepl("Cohort", term)) %>%
                    mutate(
                        Class = class, 
                        BRCA = germline,
                        term = case_when(
                            term == "CohortCarboplatin" ~ "NoTreatmentVSCarboplatin",
                            term == "CohortPARPi" ~ "NoTreatmentVSPARPi"
                        )
                    ),
                glm(
                    formula = growth_rate ~ Cohort + AGE + SEX + RACE,
                    data = df_to_plot %>%
                        filter(Gene_Class == class, BRCA == germline) %>%
                        filter(Cohort != "Healthy") %>%
                        mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Carboplatin", "PARPi")))
                ) %>%
                    sjPlot::get_model_data(type = "est") %>%
                    filter(grepl("Cohort", term)) %>%
                    mutate(
                        Class = class, 
                        BRCA = germline,
                        term = "CarboplatinVSPARPi"
                    )
            )
        }
    })
# Add the BRCA effect for each class and cohort
brca_effect <- map_dfr(c("Carboplatin", "PARPi"), function(cohort) {
    rbind(
        glm(
        formula = growth_rate ~ BRCA + AGE + SEX + RACE,
        data = df_to_plot %>%
            filter(Gene_Class == "DDR") %>%
            filter(Cohort == cohort) %>%
            mutate(BRCA = factor(BRCA, levels = c("No Germline", "BRCA1/2", "Other HRD Germline")))
    ) %>%
        sjPlot::get_model_data(type = "est") %>%
        filter(grepl("BRCA", term)) %>%
        mutate(
            term = case_when(
                term == "BRCABRCA1/2" ~ "NoGermlineVSBRCA1/2",
                term == "BRCAOther HRD Germline" ~ "NoGermlineVSOtherHRD"
            ),
            Class = "DDR",
            BRCA = cohort
        ),
        glm(
            formula = growth_rate ~ BRCA + AGE + SEX + RACE,
            data = df_to_plot %>%
                filter(Gene_Class == "DDR") %>%
                filter(Cohort == cohort) %>%
                filter(BRCA != "No Germline") %>%
                mutate(BRCA = factor(BRCA, levels = c("BRCA1/2", "Other HRD Germline")))
        ) %>%
        sjPlot::get_model_data(type = "est") %>%
        filter(term == "BRCAOther HRD Germline") %>%
        mutate(
            term = "BRCA1/2VsOtherHRD",
            Class = "DDR",
            BRCA = cohort
        )
    )
})
model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm <- bind_rows(model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm, brca_effect)
model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm <- model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm %>% filter(Class == "DDR")

glm(
    formula = growth_rate ~ BRCA + AGE + SEX + RACE,
    data = df_to_plot %>%
        filter(Gene_Class == "DDR") %>%
        filter(Cohort == "PARPi") %>%
        filter(BRCA != "No Germline") %>%
        mutate(BRCA = factor(BRCA, levels = c("BRCA1/2", "Other HRD Germline")))
) %>%
sjPlot::get_model_data(type = "est")

df_to_plot <- df_to_plot %>%
    filter(BRCA %in% c("No Germline", "BRCA1/2", "Other HRD Germline")) %>%
    filter(growth_rate != Inf & growth_rate != -Inf) %>% 
    filter(Gene_Class == "DDR") %>%
    mutate(BRCA = factor(BRCA, levels = c("No Germline", "BRCA1/2", "Other HRD Germline", "Other Germline")))
supp_fig7 <- df_to_plot %>%
    ggplot(
        aes(
            x = BRCA,
            y = growth_rate,
            fill = Cohort
        )
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width=0.2), alpha = 0.2, color = "black") +
    labs(
        x = "",
        y = "Growth Rate",
        fill = "Cohort"
    ) +
    panel_theme_basic +
    scale_fill_manual(values = treatment_colors) +
    theme(plot.margin = margin(2, 0, 0, 1, "cm")) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans = scales::pseudo_log_trans(0.001), limit = c(NA, 4), breaks = c(-0.05, -0.01, -0.005, 0, 0.005, 0.01, 0.05)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot, 4, 0.75, 1, model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.value[1], model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.stars[1], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot, 5, 0.75, 1.25, model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.value[2], model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.stars[2], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot, 6, 1, 1.25, model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.value[3], model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.stars[3], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot, 4, 1.81, 2.19, model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.value[4], model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.stars[4], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot, 3, 2.81, 3.19, model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.value[5], model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.stars[5], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot, 4.5, 1, 1.81, model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.value[6], model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.stars[6], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot, 7, 1, 2.81, model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.value[7], model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.stars[7], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot, 5, 1.81, 2.81, model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.value[8], model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.stars[8], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot, 6, 1.25, 2.19, model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.value[9], model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.stars[9], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot, 8, 1.25, 3.19, model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.value[10], model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.stars[10], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig_data(df_to_plot, 4, 2.19, 3.19, model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.value[11], model_growth_rate_germline_BRCA_class_glm$p.stars[11], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, size = 0.5, textsize = 6))
supp_fig7
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure7_GrowthRate_HRD_Germline.png"), supp_fig7, width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

# Supp Figure 10 - No Rescue
```{r supp_fig10, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width=15, fig.height=20}
df_to_plot <- timepoints %>%
  filter(growth_rate_sensitivity != Inf & growth_rate_sensitivity != -Inf) %>%
  filter(Gene_Class == "DDR" | Gene_Class == "DTA")

model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity <- rbind(
    glm(
        formula = growth_rate_sensitivity ~ Cohort + AGE + SEX + RACE,
        data = df_to_plot %>% filter(Gene_Class == "DDR")
    ) %>%
        sjPlot::get_model_data(type = "est") %>%
        filter(grepl("Cohort", term)),
    glm(
        formula = growth_rate_sensitivity ~ Cohort + AGE + SEX + RACE,
        data = df_to_plot %>% filter(Gene_Class == "DDR") %>%
            filter(Cohort != "Healthy") %>%
            mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Carboplatin", "PARPi")))
    ) %>%
        sjPlot::get_model_data(type = "est") %>%
        filter(grepl("Cohort", term)) %>%
        mutate(term = "CarboplatinPARPi")
)

counts <- df_to_plot %>%
    group_by(Cohort, Gene_Class) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

supp_fig10 <- df_to_plot %>%
    ggplot(
        aes(
            x = Gene_Class,
            y = growth_rate_sensitivity,
            fill = Cohort 
        )
    ) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width=0.2), alpha = 0.2, color = "black") +
    geom_text(data = counts, aes(label = n, y = 0.04), size = 8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", alpha = 0.3) +
    labs(
        x = "",
        y = "Growth Rate",
        fill = "Cohort"
    ) +
    panel_theme_basic +
    scale_fill_nejm() + 
    theme(plot.margin = margin(1, 0, 0, 1, "cm")) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans = scales::pseudo_log_trans(0.001), breaks = c(-0.05, -0.01, -0.005, 0, 0.005, 0.01, 0.05), limit = c(NA, 1.5)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig(5.0, 0.75, 1, model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity$p.value[1], model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity$p.stars[1], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig(5.6, 0.75, 1.25, model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity$p.value[2], model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity$p.stars[2], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, textsize = 6)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig(6.4, 1, 1.25, model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity$p.value[3], model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity$p.stars[3], show_values = TRUE, hide_ns = TRUE, textsize = 6))
supp_fig10
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure10_No_Rescue_GrowthRate_Sensitivity.png"), supp_fig10, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

# Supplementary Table 1 - MSK Demographics
```{r msk_table}
label(msk_df$age) <- "Age at Treatment Start"
label(msk_df$race) <- "Race"
label(msk_df$SystemTumorType) <- "Cancer Diagnosis"
label(msk_df$smoke_bin) <- "Smoking Status"

table1(~ age + Gender + race + smoke_bin + SystemTumorType | Treatment, data = msk_df)
```

# Supplementary Table 2 - MSK Clonal Hematopoiesis
```{r msk_clinical, echo=FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
label(msk_df$ch_pancan_pd_bin) <- "Clonal Hematopoiesis"
label(msk_df$mutnum_pancan_pd) <- "Number of Mutations"
label(msk_df$VAF_pancan_pd) <- "Maximum VAF"

table1(
  ~ ch_pancan_pd_bin + VAF_pancan_pd + mutnum_pancan_pd | Treatment, 
  data = msk_df
)
```

# Supplementary Table 3 - Carboplatin and PARPi Demographics
```{r carbo_parp_table, echo=FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
label(table_demographics$AGE) <- "Age at Treatment Start"
label(table_demographics$HRD) <- "Germline Genetic Testing"
label(table_demographics$CANCER.DX) <- "Cancer Diagnosis"
label(table_demographics$RACE) <- "Race"
label(table_demographics$SEX) <- "Sex"

table1(~ AGE + SEX + RACE + Smoking + Drug + CANCER.DX + HRD + HRD_Single | Cohort, data = table_demographics %>% mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Healthy", "Carboplatin", "PARPi"))))
```

# Supplementary Table 4 - Longitudinal CH Mutations
```{r ch_mutation_table, echo=FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
timepoints %>%
    select(key, Gene) %>% 
    mutate(Gene = factor(Gene, levels = gene_list)) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    arrange(Gene) %>%
    fwrite(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppTable4_Longitudinal_CH_Mutations.csv"))
```

# Supplementary Table 5 - CH Mutations with Mutational Characteristics
```{r ch_mutation_characteristics, echo=FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
timepoints %>%
    select(DeID, Cohort, key, Gene, preVAF, postVAF, change_in_days) %>%
    mutate(Gene = factor(Gene, levels = gene_list)) %>%
    arrange(Gene) %>%
    dplyr::rename(
        `VAF at Pre-Treatment` = preVAF,
        `VAF at Post-Treatment` = postVAF,
        `Days Between Timepoints` = change_in_days
    ) %>%
    fwrite(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppTable5_CH_Mutations_Characteristics.csv"))
```

# Supplementary Table 6 - Prior Drugs
```{r prior_drugs_table, echo=FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
drug_info %>%
    filter(!(DEID %in% c(Not_Paired_DEID, Samples_Less_Than_30_Days_Apart))) %>%
    # We will also remove "oral" drugs that were only taken for a day since these are likely issues with data entry
    filter(!(grepl("oral", APR_ROUTE) & APR_DURATION == 1)) %>%
    # Now we need to find the oldest occurrence of a specific drug
    group_by(DEID, druggeneric, drugclass_c, Cohort) %>%
    summarise(earliest_drug_date = min(APR_START_DTE, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    left_join(
        deid_earliest_regimen_date %>%
            select(DEID, Cohort, earliest_regimen_date),
        by = c("DEID", "Cohort")
    ) %>%
    # These are all the drugs that were received prior to the earliest sample collection date, so we can be assured that they were received before the sample was collected
    filter(
        earliest_drug_date < (earliest_regimen_date)
    ) %>%
    mutate(
        drugclass = case_when(
            drugclass_c == "targeted_therapy_parp" ~ "PARP Inhibitor",
            drugclass_c == "cytotoxic_therapy" ~ "Cytotoxic Therapy",
            drugclass_c == "cytotoxic_therapy_platinum" ~ "Platinum Therapy",
            drugclass_c == "radionuclide" ~ "Radionuclide",
            drugclass_c == "radiation_therapy" ~ "Radiation Therapy",
            drugclass_c == "immune_therapy" ~ "Immune Therapy",
            #drugclass_c == "biologic_therapy" ~ "Biologic Therapy",
            #drugclass_c == "hormonal_therapy" ~ "Hormonal Therapy",
            #drugclass_c == "protein_kinase_inhibitor" ~ "Protein Kinase Inhibitor",
            #drugclass_c == "targeted_therapy" ~ "Targeted Therapy",
            TRUE ~ "Other Targeted Therapy"
        )
    ) %>%
    # This oral entry overlaps between Olaparib and Niraparib, so we will remove it since it is likely a data entry error
    filter(!(drugclass == "PARP Inhibitor" & Cohort == "PARPi" & DEID == "1567490")) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(DEID, druggeneric, drugclass) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = drugclass, values_from = druggeneric, values_fn = list(druggeneric = function(x) paste(unique(x), collapse = "; ")), values_fill = "") %>%
    fwrite(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppTable6_Patients_Prior_Drugs.csv"))
```

# Supplementary Table 7 - MoChA Demographics
```{r mocha_table, echo=FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
label(mocha_demographics$AGE) <- "Age at Treatment Start"
label(mocha_demographics$Sex_Reported) <- "Sex"
label(mocha_demographics$Ancestry) <- "Race"

# Certain DeIDs are in both Carboplatin and PARPi cohorts, so we need to assign 
# them to one or the other based on their earliest AGE at treatment start
multi_cohort_deid_map <- c(
  "1108236" = "PARPi",
  "1536848" = "Carboplatin",
  "1537527" = "PARPi",
  "1592606" = "Carboplatin",
  "1592759" = "PARPi",
  "1620504" = "Carboplatin",
  "1734282" = "Carboplatin",
  "1755649" = "Carboplatin",
  "1782310" = "PARPi"
)

table1(
 ~ AGE + Sex_Reported + Ancestry | Cohort, 
 data = mocha_demographics %>%
      arrange(AGE) %>%                        # We assume the earliest AGE is the FIRST sample
      mutate(Cohort = dplyr::coalesce(multi_cohort_deid_map[as.character(DeID)], Cohort)) %>%
      distinct(DeID, Cohort, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
      filter(Cohort != "")
)
```
